entity.label: Nibshan
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Fertile; light soil, a city somewhere “in the wilderness” of Judah (Josh. 15:62), probably near Engedi.

nodes.label: Nibshan
nodes.description: Fertile; light soil, a city somewhere “in the wilderness” of Judah (Josh. 15:62), probably near Engedi.

verses.text: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and Engedi; six cities with their villages.
